title: lactuca orientalis subsp. orientalis
intro: Lactuca orientalis subsp. orientalis, also known as Wild lettuce or Lophosterum orientalis, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lactuca orientalis subsp. orientalis include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, as well as improved respiratory function and digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
